bonds_intro_1: Ma bondi a boma nthawi zambiri amatchedwa chikayikidwe chopanda chiwopsezo ndipo amaonedwa ngati malo otetezeka kwambiri osungira chuma.
bonds_intro_2: Bitcoin ndi ndalama zadigitala zomwe zimagwira ntchito modziyimira popanda boma kapena olamulira alikulu.
bonds_intro_3: Koma kodi ma bondi ndi opanda chiwopsezo kwenikweni? Ndipo amasiyana bwanji ndi Bitcoin ngati malo osungira chuma? Tiyeni tiwunike kusiyana kwakukulu pakati pa Bitcoin ndi ma bondi a boma.
bonds_point_2: Amatayirira mtengo chifukwa cha kukwera kwa mitengo
point_1_summary_1: Ma bondi ndi opanda chiwopsezo m'ndalama za dola yokha, kutanthauza kuti mudzalandira madola anu mukadikira mpaka kumapeto. Komabe, izi sizikuganizira chiwopsezo cha kukwera kwa mitengo, chiwopsezo cha chiwongo, ndi kutheka koti madolawo adzakhala ochepa mtengo mukawalandira.
point_1_summary_2: Bitcoin ili ndi ziwopsezo zoonetsa (kusinthasintha kwa mtengo) koma palibe chiwopsezo chobisika cha wina - muli ndi Bitcoin yanu kapena mulibe.
point_2_summary_1: Kukwera kwa mitengo kukakwera kupitirira phindu la ma bondi, eni ake a ma bondi amatayirira mphamvu yogulira chaka chilichonse.
point_2_summary_2: Phunzirani zambiri za kukwera kwa mitengo.
point_2_summary_3: Kuchuluka kokhazikika kwa Bitcoin kwa ndalama 21 miliyoni kukutanthauza kuti singawonongeke ndi kusindikiza ndalama, koma ma bondi angawonongeke.
point_3_summary_1: Pa nthawi ya mavuto a ndalama, masika a ma bondi amatha kuumirira ndi kukhala osagulitsika. Mabanki monga Silicon Valley Bank anakodwa ndi ma bondi omwe anatayirira mtengo pakwera kwa chiwongo, zomwe zinathandizira kugwa kwawo.
point_3_summary_2: Phunzirani momwe Silicon Valley Bank inalepherere ndi chifukwa Bitcoin ili yosiyana.
point_3_summary_3: Bitcoin imagulitsidwa 24/7 padziko lonse ndipo sinayambe ikhale ndi vuto la kugulitsika - nthawi zonse mutha kupeza wogula kapena wogulitsa.
point_4_summary_1: Malonda a Treasury amatha kulephera pakakhala ogula okwanira a ngongole za boma.
point_4_summary_2: Phunzirani zambiri za malonda a Treasury omwe analephera.
point_4_summary_3: Mtengo wa Bitcoin umazindikiridwa kudzera m'masika apadziko lonse osalekeza popanda malonda amkati omwe angalephera.
point_5_summary_1: Phindu la ma bondi limakhazikitsidwa mukagula. Ngakhale chuma chikukula mwachangu kapena ndalama zikuwonongeka kwambiri, phindu lanu limakhala lomwelo.
point_5_summary_2: Bitcoin ili ndi mwayi wokwera mtengo kwambiri kugwiritsiridwa ntchito kkukwera ndi kuchuluka kokhazikika kukomana ndi kufunika kokwera.
point_6_summary_1: Anthu ambiri amasunga ma bondi kudzera mwa anthu apakati monga mabanki, ma broker, kapena mafundi, zomwe zimapangitsa chiwopsezo. Simuli ndi ma bondi mwachindunji kwenikweni.
point_6_summary_2: Ndi Bitcoin, mutha kukhala ndi umwini wachindunji pokusunga wekha, kuchotsa chiwopsezo cha wina kwathunthu.
point_7_summary_1: Ma bondi amadalira kwathunthu kuthekera ndi kufuna kwa boma kulipira. Ngati boma likukumana ndi mavuto a ndalama, kulephera, kapena kusankha kuchotsa ngongole kudzera mu kukwera kwa mitengo, eni ake a ma bondi amavutika.
point_7_summary_2: Bitcoin imagwira ntchito modziyimira popanda boma lililonse ndipo singalamulire, kukweza, kapena kulephera ndi olamulira andale.
